programs.title: Beyond Paradise
programs.desc: A priceless artefact is stolen from the pirate festival, only to suddenly reappear on the police station steps. But who stands to gain from its brief disappearance.

programs.title: Shift the Thrift
programs.desc: In Eastbourne, siblings David and Theresa battle to raise money for DKMS, gambling on designer fashion, vintage finds and bold upcycled pieces.

programs.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programs.desc: Michael's South Korean railway journey continues in Seoul. Travelling across one of the world's largest metro systems, he heads south to Suwon to visit Samsung's headquarters.

programs.title: Gardeners' World
programs.desc: Monty is busy this week as the garden bursts into colour.

programs.title: See Hear: Content Creators
programs.desc: See Hear explores deaf creators online, revealing the highs, lows and realities of social media life, from viral success and community connection to pressure and criticism.
